item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and refuses another manual checkpoint, reframing the issue as source-rule and ownership failure.
